chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Transfer Application No.14 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge 1. For hearing of case 2. For hearing of MA No.5364 of 2025 01.09.2025 None present for the Applicant Ms. Amna Ansari, Additional Prosecutor General, Sindh ------------------------------- None present for the Applicant. Same was the case on the last date of hearing viz. 05.08.2025. Accordingly, dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. J U D G E Qurban
